question: The line chart shows earnings for a company from 2018 to 2022. Which of the following statements is true based on the chart?

options.B: It cannot be determined from the chart which year had the highest earnings.
options.D: Earnings in 2022 are higher than in any other year shown.

explanation: The scale is set so that the highest bars exceed the visible area, leading to a misleading impression of equality.
